target.title: Policy: add tool posture conformance checks
target.body:
## Summary

Stacked after #85096. This PR adds config-only policy conformance checks for global and per-agent tool posture:

```jsonc
{
  "tools": {
    "profiles": { "allow": ["messaging", "minimal"] },
    "fs": { "requireWorkspaceOnly": true },
    "exec": {
      "allowSecurity": ["deny", "allowlist"],
      "requireAsk": ["always"],
      "allowHosts": ["sandbox"]
    },
    "elevated": { "allow": false },
    "denyTools": ["group:runtime", "group:fs"]
  }
}
```

The checks observe `tools.profile`, `tools.allow`, `tools.deny`, `tools.fs.workspaceOnly`, `tools.exec.security`, `tools.exec.ask`, `tools.exec.host`, `tools.elevated.enabled`, and per-agent `agents.list[].tools.*` overrides. This stays at policy conformance level and does not add runtime tool enforcement.

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write --threads=1 extensions/policy/src/policy-state.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts src/config/types.tools.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm deps:shrinkwrap:check`
- `/mnt/c/src/claws-hapi/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base fork/policy-agent-workspace-conformance --reviewer codex --fallback-reviewer none`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Policy-only conformance for configured global/per-agent tool posture without runtime enforcement.

Real environment tested: WSL checkout at `/root/src/openclaw-policy-tools-conformance` on Ubuntu-24.04.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`.

Evidence after fix: 140 focused policy tests passed; `git diff --check` passed; `pnpm deps:shrinkwrap:check` passed; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: Policy reports/non-reports expected findings for tool profile, filesystem workspace-only posture, exec security/ask/host posture, elevated mode, required deny tools, inherited global posture, alias normalization, group coverage, and sandbox-sensitive omitted exec defaults.

What was not tested: Broad CI and runtime tool execution; this PR is config conformance only and intentionally does not add runtime enforcement.
